author: PC Gamer
text:
Double Fine, Ninja Theory, and more Xbox studios reportedly at risk of closure
Microsoft's "Xbox reset" is starting to sound more like a bulldozing.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Finding a great new Discord hangout game that's not a roguelike still feels like striking gold
Turok: Origins was one of the most fun things I played at last week's Summer Game Fest.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Xbox Game Studios head and chief of staff step down as 'Xbox reset' looms
Studio closures are expected as Xbox's new leadership looks for a fresh start.

author: PC Gamer
text:
It would take you 90 straight days to play each of Steam Next Fest's demos for just 30 minutes
Hooray! Also, help!

author: PC Gamer
text:
My new daily game is like Wordle but for minigolf
Play a tricky new putt-putt hole every day.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Xbox is reportedly closing South of Midnight studio Compulsion Games after bragging about its award-winning developers earlier this year
The shutdown comes just a few days after a report claiming that major layoffs at Xbox were on the way.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Blizzard almost put Devil May Cry's style rank into Overwatch for its newest combo-heavy hero Shion
The hero shooter's 52nd hero would've encouraged you to chain together abilities as often as possible.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Meccha Chameleon lives up to the hype as the next great party game—so if you haven't played it yet take this as a sign to check it out
Don't scoff at the balloon strat, this game is more stressful than it looks.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Uni researchers plan to build a low-carbon data center hivemind from 2,000 Pixel smartphones—with Google's help, no less
The omni-phone.

author: PC Gamer
text:
It looks like more handhelds will soon be able to run SteamOS if this MSI Claw gameplay test is anything to go by
A new beta lets the OS run on Intel handhelds.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sony Inzone H6 Air review
An open-back beast.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Here's when Shion and the new Overwatch season release in your region
Shion's a new bike-wielding DPS hero arriving in Into the Tiger's Den.

author: PC Gamer
text:
BioWare's co-founder fought to make Baldur's Gate 3 for over a decade, then Larian did it instead: 'I don't really get jealous'
Just as there were multiple Bhaalspawn, there was never really just one Baldur's Gate 3.

author: PC Gamer
text:
As Xbox eyes layoffs, Microsoft's CEO says its videogames aren't monetised enough—so it's not the cancelled games or $68.7 billion deals or AI overspending, then
Watch that line go up, up up up up up.

author: PC Gamer
text:
MSI Versa 300 Wireless 8K review
Surprisingly potent.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Gears of War: E-Day system requirements are here and it might be bad news for GTX 10-series cards and, well, storage in general
130 GB is a whopper and a half.

author: PC Gamer
text:
MSI has listed the official pre-order price of its new Claw gaming handheld and I think you're going to want to sit yourself down
$1,799. Eeeeeeesh.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Say hello to EA Advertising, which will let your favourite brands 'integrate' ads to 'enhance' your experience
"In these interactive gameplay environments, brands become part of the game itself."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Both Final Fantasy 7 remakes are dirt cheap right now in a franchise sale—but I think you should play FF12 and enjoy the series' best combat system at a discount, too
Gambits, my beloved.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Dead by Daylight celebrates its 10 year anniversary by adding the most sought after horror icon and teasing 'a sweeping visual overhaul'
Here's to another 10 years.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam's second most-played game right now is reportedly a bot-filled marketplace that can get you banned
There's a new banana in town.

author: PC Gamer
text:
2 entire years after being raked over the coals for it, Dragon's Dogma 2 is removing a bunch of those silly little microtransactions that weren't even P2W anyway
Was it worth it? No.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Solasta 2 character creator update means you can manipulate face-sliders until you're hot at last
Finally, I can be as beautiful as Azog the Defiler.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Dishonored dev defends loading screens: 'I actually have a soft spot for all that'
And also brings up an Evil Dead severed-hand scene cut from the final game.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam Week in Review: More than 300 games released on Steam last week, and 120 of them had AI disclosures
All the interesting Steam facts for the week ending June 14.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Wax Heads is a shop sim about helping someone find the album that could change their life, and it has a demo
No restocking shelves here.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Hide-and-seek game where you paint your body to blend in sells a million copies in four days
Meccha Chameleon is the latest indie smash hit centering silly multiplayer antics.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Blizzard sues to kill another World of Warcraft private server for 'large scale, egregious, and ongoing infringement of [its] intellectual property'
Project Ascension is in the MMO studio's sights.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I went to the UK's largest rock festival to see its one and only videogame band
The Primals took to the stage at Download Festival in their first non-Fanfest appearance outside of Asia.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'I try to play as a completionist and leave no stone unturned and no enemy unkilled': Returnal director Harry Krueger talks Deus Ex, Resident Evil, and the arcade classic that inspired Housemarque's best games
The Housemarque veteran guides us through the games on his PC.
